name: MAPS: Modeling Co-Existing Subjective Perspectives and Shared Meaning in Multi-Agent Cognitive Dialogue

description: arXiv:2607.14110v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Human dialogue involves more than exchanging information; it also expresses beliefs, emotions, and subjective cognitive styles. Yet current AI dialogue systems often enforce semantic uniformity, sacrificing diversity and interpretability. We present MAPS (Multi-Agent Perspective Spaces), a novel framework that models dialogue between cognitively...
author: Molood Arman, Cl\'ement Bonnafous
